description: This pipeline appears to be designed for annotating and processing image data, likely from biomedical microscopic images. It starts by setting individual annotations based on expressions, then merges and further modifies these annotations through a series of connected operations. The pipeline also involves outputting annotated images from compartments and merging annotations from multiple data items. Overall, its function seems to revolve around the detailed annotation and organization of image data for potentially complex analysis tasks.

3526d65f-bf02-4d2e-81cd-8760b1cfcc7c.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.name: annotation-merge
577ce788-8df3-495a-bbcc-31ecc29dd535.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
